subject: Fermi GBM trigger 120123.169 is not a GRB
body:
D. Gruber (MPE) and V. Connaughton report on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst
Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 348984161 (120123169)
at 04:02:39.68 UT on 23 January 2012, tentatively classified as a GRB, is
in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a solar flare."
